# ai-sdk-provider-env

> Environment-variable-driven provider for Vercel AI SDK. Configure AI providers via env vars — switch providers/models without code changes.

## Install

npm/pnpm/bun add ai-sdk-provider-env
Peer deps: @ai-sdk/provider (>=3), ai (>=4)
Optional peer deps (install per compatibility mode used):
  @ai-sdk/openai, @ai-sdk/anthropic, @ai-sdk/google, @ai-sdk/openai-compatible

## Quick Start

```ts
import { envProvider } from 'ai-sdk-provider-env'
import { generateText } from 'ai'

// Set OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-xxx in env
const provider = envProvider()
const { text } = await generateText({
  model: provider.languageModel('openai/gpt-4o'),
  prompt: 'Hello!',
})
```

## Core Concept

Model ID format: `{configSet}/{modelId}` — first `/` splits config set from model.
Config set maps to UPPERCASED env var prefix. Hyphens normalize to underscores:
  `my-api/model` → reads `MY_API_*` env vars

## Env Vars

| Variable              | Required              | Description                                                  |
| --------------------- | --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `{PREFIX}_API_KEY`    | Yes                   | API key                                                      |
| `{PREFIX}_BASE_URL`   | Unless preset matches | API base URL                                                 |
| `{PREFIX}_PRESET`     | No                    | Built-in preset name                                         |
| `{PREFIX}_COMPATIBLE` | No                    | `openai`·`anthropic`·`gemini`·`openai-compatible` (default)  |
| `{PREFIX}_HEADERS`    | No                    | Custom HTTP headers (JSON string)                            |
| `{PREFIX}_NATIVE_ROUTING` | No               | Enable/disable native model routing (`true`/`false`)         |

## Built-in Presets

When a config set name matches a preset, it auto-applies — only `_API_KEY` is needed.
Available presets: openai, anthropic, google, deepseek, groq, together, fireworks, mistral, moonshot, moonshot-china, perplexity, openrouter, siliconflow, siliconflow-china, xai, zai, zhipu, opencode-zen, opencode-go.

Each preset provides a default `baseURL` and `compatible` mode.
For full details (URLs, compatible modes), inspect the `builtinPresets` export:

```ts
import { builtinPresets } from 'ai-sdk-provider-env'
console.log(builtinPresets)
```

Disable auto-detect: `envProvider({ presetAutoDetect: false })`

## envProvider(options?) → ProviderV3

```ts
interface EnvProviderOptions {
  separator?: string               // default '_', env var prefix separator
  configs?: Record<string, ConfigSetEntry>  // explicit configs (highest priority)
  defaults?: {
    fetch?: typeof globalThis.fetch  // custom fetch for all providers
    headers?: Record<string, string> // default headers (overridden by per-config-set)
  }
  presetAutoDetect?: boolean        // default true
  factories?: EnvProviderFactories  // for bundler-safe usage
}

interface ConfigSetEntry {
  apiKey: string
  preset?: string                   // built-in preset name
  baseURL?: string                  // optional when preset is set
  compatible?: 'openai' | 'anthropic' | 'gemini' | 'openai-compatible'
  headers?: Record<string, string>
  nativeRouting?: boolean           // enable native SDK routing per model prefix
}
```

Returned provider supports: `languageModel()`, `embeddingModel()`, `imageModel()`,
`textEmbeddingModel()`, `transcriptionModel()`, `speechModel()`, `rerankingModel()`

## Compatibility Modes

| Value               | SDK Package                | Fallback                            |
| ------------------- | -------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `openai`            | `@ai-sdk/openai`          | `@ai-sdk/openai-compatible` if n/a  |
| `anthropic`         | `@ai-sdk/anthropic`       | None (must install)                 |
| `gemini`            | `@ai-sdk/google`          | None (must install)                 |
| `openai-compatible` | `@ai-sdk/openai-compatible`| — (default mode)                   |

## Common Patterns

### Preset provider (env vars only)
```bash
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-xxx
```
```ts
provider.languageModel('openai/gpt-4o')
```

### Custom endpoint
```bash
MYAPI_BASE_URL=https://api.example.com/v1
MYAPI_API_KEY=sk-xxx
```
```ts
provider.languageModel('myapi/some-model')
```

### Multiple providers
```bash
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-xxx
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-xxx
DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=sk-ds-xxx
```
```ts
provider.languageModel('openai/gpt-4o')
provider.languageModel('anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514')
provider.languageModel('deepseek/deepseek-chat')
```

### Code-based config (skip env vars)
```ts
const provider = envProvider({
  configs: {
    openai: {
      apiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY!,
      preset: 'openai',
    },
    custom: {
      apiKey: 'key',
      baseURL: 'https://custom.api.com/v1',
      compatible: 'openai-compatible',
    },
  },
})
```

### Provider registry
```ts
import { createProviderRegistry } from 'ai'

const registry = createProviderRegistry({ env: envProvider() })
registry.languageModel('env:openai/gpt-4o')
registry.embeddingModel('env:openai/text-embedding-3-small')
```

### Bundler-safe (explicit factories)
```ts
import { createOpenAI } from '@ai-sdk/openai'
import { createAnthropic } from '@ai-sdk/anthropic'

const provider = envProvider({
  factories: {
    openai: createOpenAI,
    anthropic: createAnthropic,
  },
})
```

### Custom headers & fetch
```ts
const provider = envProvider({
  defaults: {
    fetch: myCustomFetch,
    headers: { 'X-App-Name': 'my-app' },
  },
})
```

## Exports

```ts
export { envProvider } from 'ai-sdk-provider-env'
export { builtinPresets } from 'ai-sdk-provider-env'
// Types: ConfigSetEntry, EnvProviderOptions, EnvProviderDefaults,
//   EnvProviderFactories, EnvProviderFactoryOptions,
//   EnvProviderNamedFactoryOptions, PresetConfig, ProviderV3Compatible
```
